name: nexus-calculator
description: Smart AI-powered calculator with currency & metric converters, voice commands, and 10 themes
author: Collins Anyanwu

scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:www && cap sync android
scripts.build:apk:debug: npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.build:apk:release: npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.build:bundle: npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew bundleRelease
